burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; impacts growth and psychosocial health

vulnerablePopulations: migrants with limited access to care
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Height < -2 SD for age/sex or poor growth velocity; endocrine workup when indicated

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with pediatric endocrine access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Standardized growth charts and referral pathways
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying causes; GH therapy for eligible cases
